title: Tenant-Settings Migration — master_record_tenant → vector_artefacts
scope: Migrate the /tenant-settings API endpoint from master_record_tenant in mmff_vector to a new master_record_tenant table in vector_artefacts. The existing table stores subscription-scoped org configuration (name, brand colours, timezone, etc.). The new table uses workspace_id as the tenancy key (consistent with the rest of vector_artefacts). A one-time ETL step copies live data. The handler service is rewritten to query vaPool. The route is registered under /samantha/v2; the v1 registration is removed. This unblocks PLA-0030 T4b, completing Task 4.
value: Eliminates the last subscription-scoped config table blocking v2 promotion. After this plan, every non-topology non-legacy route will be backed by vector_artefacts, making PLA-0030 Task 10 (v1 block removal) dependent only on topology, defects, user-stories, flows, and portfolio-items migrations.
implementation_plan: Task 1: Inspect master_record_tenant schema in mmff_vector — list all columns; map subscription_id → workspace_id tenancy translation; identify any columns not present in PLA-0024 schema changes.
Task 2: Create artefacts_schema migration — new master_record_tenant table in vector_artefacts scoped by workspace_id (mirroring the existing column set but dropping subscription_id).
Task 3: ETL — one-off script to copy master_record_tenant rows from mmff_vector to vector_artefacts, resolving subscription_id → workspace_id via the workspaces table.
Task 4: Rewrite tenantsettings.Service to query vaPool; tenancy gate uses mmff_vector pool for membership check only.
Task 5: Register /tenant-settings under /samantha/v2 in main.go; remove /samantha/v1 registration.
Task 6: Switch frontend callers to apiInfra or apiV2 as appropriate (tenant-settings may qualify as infra — decide during implementation).
Task 7: Update openapi-v2.yaml + openapi.yaml; update c_c_v1_v2_cutover.md and PLA-0030 T4 → done.
areas_impacted: Backend: backend/cmd/server/main.go — v2 registration, v1 deregistration
Database: new artefacts_schema migration for master_record_tenant in vector_artefacts
Frontend: api('/tenant-settings') callers → apiV2 or apiInfra

work_item_backlog.title: Update openapi specs + cutover register + PLA-0030 T4 done

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /samantha/v2/tenant-settings returns 200 with data sourced from vector_artefacts
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: curl smoke test against running backend

acceptance_criteria.criterion: No frontend callers reference api('/tenant-settings') — check_callers.py reports 0

risks.risk: PLA-0024 may alter master_record_tenant schema (rename/restructure) — timing dependency if PLA-0024 and PLA-0032 run concurrently
risks.mitigation: Coordinate with PLA-0024; complete PLA-0024's tenant-settings changes before running the ETL migration in Task 3

risks.risk: subscription_id → workspace_id mapping may be ambiguous for multi-workspace subscriptions
risks.mitigation: ETL audit during Task 1 confirms cardinality; one-workspace-per-subscription assumption documented or multi-workspace case handled explicitly
